## Meeting Purpose

[Diagnose Google Analytics (GA) and UTM tracking issues.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=21.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Problem:** GA4 data is inflated (e.g., sessions, clicks), and UTMs are duplicating (e.g., `medium` values appearing 3x).](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Context:** The site is a Next.js headless app using GTM for GA4 and OneTrust for consent.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [**Action:** Andrew will provide Talal with all necessary files and data for investigation.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [**Timeline:** Talal will investigate tonight and provide an update by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

## Topics

### Problem: Inflated GA4 Data

  - [GA4 reports inflated metrics, with sessions and Google search clicks showing significant variances.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [This is likely a symptom of the root cause: UTM parameter duplication.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Problem: UTM Duplication

  - [UTM parameters are duplicating, causing inflated data.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [**Example:** The `medium` value is appearing up to three times for a single session.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [This issue is unfamiliar to both Andrew (10+ years experience) and Talal (16 years experience).](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)

### Context: Site & Tracking Setup

  - [**Site:** Next.js headless application.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - **Tracking:** GTM loads GA4 script in the `<head>` via `app.tsx`.
  - [**Consent:** OneTrust manages user consent, which triggers the GTM tags.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Initial Hypothesis:** A Next.js page-loading bug was considered but dismissed as unlikely for a mature framework.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andrew:**](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Send Talal all relevant files:](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
          - [GTM container script](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
          - [`app.tsx` file](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
          - [GA4 discrepancy report](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [Provide GTM container access upon request.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [**Talal:**](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [Investigate tonight using the provided materials.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [Provide an update by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/-FVLePpx7652ousyMWttyRsvFgavjATA?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
